prompt: A fashion-inspired collage combining sketches of elegant dresses with real fabric swatches, layered to create a dynamic, textured fashion plate on a gray background.
prompt_refined: A dynamic and textured fashion-inspired mixed-media collage, showcasing several elegant dress sketches in a classic fashion illustration style. These sketches are intricately layered with various real fabric swatches, including silk, lace, and brocade, creating an overlapping composition. The entire fashion plate is presented on a clean, neutral gray background.
